identity.name: FightNet
identity.aesthetic: Dark Brutalist, Concrete, Neon Red Accents
identity.description: A social platform for the combat sports community. Dark, gritty, and punchy.

rules.overline: font-barlow uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-xs font-bold text-red-600

backgroundImage.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

visual_enhancers.textures: Use noise background on the main body to give a gritty feel.

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. Gap-6 for grids.
layout_strategy.grid: Mobile: 1 col. Desktop: 12 col grid. Feed: Centered 600px max-width.
layout_strategy.alignment: Left align text generally. Center align Hero text.

button.base: font-barlow font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm transition-all duration-200
button.outline: bg-transparent border-2 border-red-600 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-600 hover:text-white

card.base: bg-neutral-900 border border-neutral-800 rounded-sm p-6 relative overflow-hidden group

input.base: bg-black border border-neutral-800 focus:border-red-600 rounded-sm h-12 px-4 text-white placeholder:text-neutral-600

ko_button.description: Special 'Super Like' button formatted as a boxing glove or KO text.
ko_button.style: text-red-600 font-anton text-xl hover:scale-125 transition-transform cursor-pointer drop-shadow-lg

universal_guidelines: NEVER use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid blacks or dark greys.
Use red sparingly as a 'Signal Color' for actions and alerts.
Typography MUST be uppercase for all headings using 'Anton'.
Use the 'noise' texture in the background of the <body> or main container to reduce digital flatness.
Inputs should look 'carved out' (darker than card background).
For 'KO' reaction, use a pulsing animation effect.
instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Add the font links to index.html or import in CSS.
3. Update tailwind.config.js with the colors and font families provided.
4. Apply the 'dark' class to the html/body tag permanently.
5. Use 'Anton' for all H1-H3 tags. Use 'Barlow' for P, Span, Div.
6. Create a 'Layout' component that includes the noise texture overlay.
7. Implement the 'KO' button logic as a special state of the Like button.
